tickets.title: Bootstrap environment and confirm scaffold readiness
tickets.summary: Confirm runtime and toolchain prerequisites, install project and test dependencies, verify validation commands can run in this environment, and replace scaffold placeholders before deeper implementation work begins.
acceptance: Runtime and required toolchain executables are present or the gap is explicitly reported
Project dependencies are installed using repo-appropriate Ubuntu-safe commands
Test dependencies are installed using repo-appropriate Ubuntu-safe commands
Canonical validation commands are identified and can be executed from the repo root
Canonical brief updated with real project content
Team entrypoints and ticket tools verified

tickets.title: Create Android export surfaces
tickets.summary: Create and validate the repo-local Android export surfaces for this Godot Android target, including export_presets.cfg, android/ support files, and the canonical debug export command.
acceptance: export_presets.cfg exists at repo root and defines an Android preset
Repo-local android support surfaces exist and are not placeholder content
The canonical Godot Android debug export target is build/android/womanvshorsevc-debug.apk

tickets.title: Build Android debug APK
tickets.summary: Produce and validate the canonical Android debug APK at build/android/womanvshorsevc-debug.apk using the repo-managed Godot Android export surfaces.
acceptance: A debug APK is produced at build/android/womanvshorsevc-debug.apk or the exact blocker is recorded with command evidence
The APK build uses the Android export surfaces owned by ANDROID-001
Release-readiness evidence names the exact export command and outcome
